item.title: A life-changing event.
item.description:
I don't have the source for this, just the video. My original upload cropped the video, so it wasn't complete. Here is the full thing. I appreciate your patience.
I'd like to hear if any of you have any similar experiences.
My wife has a few stories like this. She grew up in Kansas as one of two black children in the county. The nonchalant behavior of what is now the red hat groupIs... told... quite well here.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: 23 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 238
item.description: “A person who has good thoughts cannot ever be ugly. You can have a wonky nose and a crooked mouth and a double chin and stick-out teeth, but if you have good thoughts they will shine out of your face...
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.dc:creator: JamieSays

item.title: It's Thigh Time already in France
item.description:
This is a dress I found in the states at a thrift store
I love it cause it is super floral and I love the colors
AND IT HAS POCKETS
It's a cheap Lularoe brand
But very forgiving and flattering I think
It allows a lot of easy access for the wind to breeze underneath
The colors are really nice.
I know there are no thigh highs in these pics but I hope you still get some joy. Have a nice Thursday everyone.
item.dc:creator: princesscindycat

item.title: Peak Masculinity
item.description: Canadian Astronaut Jeremy Hansen and US Astronaut Reid Wiseman embracing and crying after Hansen called down to name a previously undiscovered crater Carroll who had recently died of cancer. The crew had previously discussed this as a possibility. This is what real men do for each other, they support each other and love each other.
item.dc:creator: LordHosk

item.title: Flock safety for pedophiles
item.description: Read the entire report here: https://jasonhunyar.substack.com/p/why-are-flock-employees-watching-720?r=7c08v8 I don't care if it's for technical reasons, product demos, or whatever excuse we'll hear. There is simply no acceptable reason to remotely view children via a preschool or private gym's cameras unless a serious crime was committed. Your local government might be discussing surveillance tech like Flock cameras, facial recognition, or automated license plate readers right now. This map helps you find those meetings and take action. https://alpr.watch/ source: @bennjordan in yt: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/YwVBsFD7v84 #flock #cameras #alpr #bennjordan #benn
item.dc:creator: djhash

item.title: Kitten is not happy to be waiting for food
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Fuckin idiots the whole lot of them
item.description: Trump’s negotiators didn’t realize they agreed to allowing Iran to continue uranium enrichment in the non-English version of the agreement because Kash Patel and Marco Rubio fired all the Iranian experts last year who spoke Farsi to keep up with DOGE cuts. Let that sink in.￼ https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/three-missing-words-ceasefire-plan-062025452.html

item.title: One of the darkest days in Lebanon’s recent history! 100 Israeli strikes in 10 minutes across different regions.
item.description: More than 250 have been killed and 1,200 wounded, with the toll expected to rise as civilians remain trapped under the rubble. My heart is aching. I’m still in shock.
item.dc:creator: jee22

item.title: she needs to rot in prison
item.dc:creator: baals

item.title: So everyone I have found out that Ash Williams Evil Dead actor Bruce Campbell 67 years old has been diagnosed with cancer it’s treatable but not curable
item.description: Bruce Campbell, 67, announced in March 2026 that he has been diagnosed with a "treatable," but not "curable" form of cancer. The Evil Dead actor did not specify the exact type of cancer, but noted it will require treatment, impacting his convention schedule. He described it as a treatable but not curable type of cancer.Response: Campbell shared on X (formerly Twitter) that he is treating this as an "opportunity". Impact: He plans to cancel some appearances but aims to continue promoting his new movie, Ernie & Emma. Privacy: He did not specify the exact type of cancer and is not seeking advice.
item.dc:creator: sonic900

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @DungeonDudsNJewels made this! It's a work of art. Check out their profile for more and leave some love.
27 Man Tax: James Garner
“An eye for an eye will only make the whole world blind.” - Mohandas Gandhi So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
